item.title: West Texas families deserve answers before these corrupt big…
item.author: Clayton Tucker (@claytontuckertx.com)
item.description:
West Texas families deserve answers before these corrupt big shots get the green light.

These data center developers promise jobs, power, water, and progress, but too often Texans are left with higher bills, louder neighborhoods, more pollution, and more questions than answers.
item.content:encoded:
West Texas families deserve answers before these corrupt big shots get the green light.

These data center developers promise jobs, power, water, and progress, but too often Texans are left with higher bills, louder neighborhoods, more pollution, and more questions than answers.

item.title: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今…
item.author: katokich (@katokich.bsky.social)
item.description: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今度いつ来る」とニコニコしながらおにぎり食べてて最高すぎる
item.content:encoded: 今海沿いの温泉にある食堂にいるんだけど、高齢の女性団体客が隣のテーブルで「幸せだね」「幸せすぎる」「明日も幸せだね」「今度いつ来る」とニコニコしながらおにぎり食べてて最高すぎる

item.title: #🔖エンタメ ダフト・パンク解散後も人生は続く──トーマ・バンガルテルが語る、ロボットスーツを脱いだ先で見出したもの …
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖エンタメ
ダフト・パンク解散後も人生は続く──トーマ・バンガルテルが語る、ロボットスーツを脱いだ先で見出したもの | Rolling Stone Japan(ローリングストーン ジャパン）

HOME ダフト・パンク解散後も人生は続く──トーマ・バンガルテルが語る、ロボットスーツを脱いだ先で見出したもの ダフト・パンク（Daft Punk）の解散以降、トーマ・バンガルテル（Thomas Bangalter）は素顔で世界を渡り歩いている。即興のDJセット、ハイブリッドな創作活動、バレエのために制作されたニューアルバム、そ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖エンタメ
ダフト・パンク解散後も人生は続く──トーマ・バンガルテルが語る、ロボットスーツを脱いだ先で見出したもの | Rolling Stone Japan(ローリングストーン ジャパン）

HOME ダフト・パンク解散後も人生は続く──トーマ・バンガルテルが語る、ロボットスーツを脱いだ先で見出したもの ダフト・パンク（Daft Punk）の解散以降、トーマ・バンガルテル（Thomas Bangalter）は素顔で世界を渡り歩いている。即興のDJセット、ハイブリッドな創作活動、バレエのために制作されたニューアルバム、そ...

item.title: I spoke to my old friend Mitch McConnell today over the phon…
item.author: Roberto Shenanigans (@robertoshenanigans.bsky.social)
item.description: I spoke to my old friend Mitch McConnell today over the phone for around 20 minutes and he told me that LeBron is going to sign with the Cleveland Cavaliers
item.content:encoded: I spoke to my old friend Mitch McConnell today over the phone for around 20 minutes and he told me that LeBron is going to sign with the Cleveland Cavaliers

item.title: 鶏のタルタルソースかけを作ってみた ゆで卵を作る 潰してマヨネーズを入れる 胡椒も入れる タルタルソース完成〜 鶏肉…
item.author: ShoreFreak (@shorefreak.bsky.social)
item.description:
鶏のタルタルソースかけを作ってみた

ゆで卵を作る
潰してマヨネーズを入れる
胡椒も入れる
タルタルソース完成〜

鶏肉にフォークで穴を開ける
塩胡椒をふる

油を入れて、皮から焼いて反対も焼く
油が出るのでキッチンペーパーで拭く

醤油大さじ2、砂糖大さじ半分を入れる

お皿に移してタルタルソースをかける
完成〜

卵の黄身が黄色かったんでタルタル黄色いなぁ
item.content:encoded:
鶏のタルタルソースかけを作ってみた

ゆで卵を作る
潰してマヨネーズを入れる
胡椒も入れる
タルタルソース完成〜

鶏肉にフォークで穴を開ける
塩胡椒をふる

油を入れて、皮から焼いて反対も焼く
油が出るのでキッチンペーパーで拭く

醤油大さじ2、砂糖大さじ半分を入れる

お皿に移してタルタルソースをかける
完成〜

卵の黄身が黄色かったんでタルタル黄色いなぁ

item.title: WNBA All-Star weekend 2026 is adding a historic new venue. …
item.author: leftylady.bsky.social (@leftylady.bsky.social)
item.description:
WNBA All-Star weekend 2026 is adding a historic new venue.

Several WNBA All-Star events and activities will take place at the newly opened Obama Presidential Center, making the league the first professional sports league to host programming at the historic Chicago venue.

(via WNBA)
item.content:encoded:
WNBA All-Star weekend 2026 is adding a historic new venue.

Several WNBA All-Star events and activities will take place at the newly opened Obama Presidential Center, making the league the first professional sports league to host programming at the historic Chicago venue.

(via WNBA)

item.title: AlphaEvolve is now Generally Available (GA) via Google Cloud…
item.author: Google for Developers (@developers.google.com)
item.description:
AlphaEvolve is now Generally Available (GA) via Google Cloud.

Built in partnership with Google DeepMind, this Gemini-powered agent brings autonomous algorithm optimization to your hardest engineering and research problems.
item.content:encoded:
AlphaEvolve is now Generally Available (GA) via Google Cloud.

Built in partnership with Google DeepMind, this Gemini-powered agent brings autonomous algorithm optimization to your hardest engineering and research problems.

item.title: I’ve been reading The Hobbit to my son (9) every night for t…
item.author: Maria J Pérez Cuervo (@mjpcuervo.com)
item.description: I’ve been reading The Hobbit to my son (9) every night for the last few weeks. We finished it last night. His verdict: “This is probably one of the best books I’ve ever read.”
item.content:encoded: I’ve been reading The Hobbit to my son (9) every night for the last few weeks. We finished it last night. His verdict: “This is probably one of the best books I’ve ever read.”

item.title: Tolkien wrote a YA novel where the villain was Smaug, an evi…
item.author: Jonathan W. Gray (@elmcitytree.blacksky.app)
item.description: Tolkien wrote a YA novel where the villain was Smaug, an evil dragon that hoarded wealth & polluted the earth. Everyone working in tech who loves that book & that author has missed its point. These are also the same people who assert that thinking about literature is a waste of time. 🤬🤬
item.content:encoded: Tolkien wrote a YA novel where the villain was Smaug, an evil dragon that hoarded wealth & polluted the earth. Everyone working in tech who loves that book & that author has missed its point. These are also the same people who assert that thinking about literature is a waste of time. 🤬🤬

item.title: 🚨 BREAKING: Jürgen Klopp is reportedly leading growing cri…
item.author: Mary Sweeney (@mcsweeney.bsky.social)
item.description:
🚨 BREAKING:
Jürgen Klopp is reportedly leading growing criticism of FIFA President Gianni Infantino, with calls for accountability over what many critics describe as one of the most controversial World Cups in recent memory. "This is our sport, not theirs," Klopp said.￼
item.content:encoded:
🚨 BREAKING:
Jürgen Klopp is reportedly leading growing criticism of FIFA President Gianni Infantino, with calls for accountability over what many critics describe as one of the most controversial World Cups in recent memory. "This is our sport, not theirs," Klopp said.￼

item.title: I just want to say, while we’re on the subject: ALL of our …
item.author: Matt Hodler (@mhodler.bsky.social)
item.description:
I just want to say, while we’re on the subject:

ALL of our youth sports, in one way or another, are too expensive & have too high of a barriers of entry - not just soccer.

+ we should reform our youth sports not with the goal to win a mWC, but with the goal to provide opps to play for all kids
item.content:encoded:
I just want to say, while we’re on the subject:

ALL of our youth sports, in one way or another, are too expensive & have too high of a barriers of entry - not just soccer.

+ we should reform our youth sports not with the goal to win a mWC, but with the goal to provide opps to play for all kids

item.title: Maggie Haberman is always telling us about stuff that happen…
item.author: Larry Mitchell (@drlarrymitchell.bsky.social)
item.description: Maggie Haberman is always telling us about stuff that happened a few years ago but she never tells us about what's going on today, because she doesn't have a book to sell yet.
item.content:encoded: Maggie Haberman is always telling us about stuff that happened a few years ago but she never tells us about what's going on today, because she doesn't have a book to sell yet.

item.title: How sweet. I was working at my studio when a curious couple …
item.author: Ann Brauer (@annies330.bsky.social)
item.description: How sweet. I was working at my studio when a curious couple came in to see my quilts. Surprise--they left with "bright morning". Yes, I will miss it. Oh well. #artquilts #surprise #studiovisit #shelburnefalls #quilts
item.content:encoded: How sweet. I was working at my studio when a curious couple came in to see my quilts. Surprise--they left with "bright morning". Yes, I will miss it. Oh well. #artquilts #surprise #studiovisit #shelburnefalls #quilts

item.title: 'Beat every single Russian' — Ukrainian semifinalist at Wimb…
item.author: BenB 🇺🇦 (@benborges.xyz)
item.description:
'Beat every single Russian' — Ukrainian semifinalist at Wimbledon condemns IOC ruling on Russia
"I just want to go out there and hopefully beat every single Russian I play in the Olympics," Ukrainian tennis star Marta Kostiuk said after advancing to the semifinals at Wimbledon.
item.content:encoded:
'Beat every single Russian' — Ukrainian semifinalist at Wimbledon condemns IOC ruling on Russia
"I just want to go out there and hopefully beat every single Russian I play in the Olympics," Ukrainian tennis star Marta Kostiuk said after advancing to the semifinals at Wimbledon.

item.title: dieser tennisball wäre ein besserer bürgermeister als kai we…

item.description:

item.title: Why do we say "slept like a baby?” Babies wake up every 2 h…
item.author: For the Love of Missy (@missybbbobtail.bsky.social)
item.description:
Why do we say
"slept like a baby?”

Babies wake up every 2 hours crying.

I want to sleep liked my cat.... 12 hours straight, zero regrets. 💤💤💤
item.content:encoded:
Why do we say
"slept like a baby?”

Babies wake up every 2 hours crying.

I want to sleep liked my cat.... 12 hours straight, zero regrets. 💤💤💤

item.description: Hearn was charged with destruction of property for allegedly pulling up sealant installed at the Reflecting Pool, prosecutors said last week.
item.content:encoded: Hearn was charged with destruction of property for allegedly pulling up sealant installed at the Reflecting Pool, prosecutors said last week.

item.content:encoded: Ordu Perşembe yaylası.. Bu alana maden izni istiyorlar daha da sözüm yok..
